message:
test(readme): SqlReflectedTable lookup methods coverage

SqlReflectedTable has 6 lookup methods added in fd90.51 (column,
index, unique_constraint) and fd90.52 (foreign_keys_for_column,
indexes_for_column, unique_constraints_for_column). The bundle
field access was tested in fd90.9 but the lookup helpers were
uncovered.

Extends readme_quick_start_round_trip_through_sqlite with
assertions on the existing 'child' bundle:

- column("cid") → Some; column("ghost_col") → None
- index("idx_child_code") → Some; index("ghost_idx") → None
- unique_constraint(<first UC name>) → Some (proves the lookup
  matches against backend-generated names like sqlite_autoindex_*)
- foreign_keys_for_column("parent_id") → non-empty; first FK's
  referenced_table is "parent"
- foreign_keys_for_column("cid") → empty (cid is not in any FK)
- indexes_for_column("code") → non-empty (idx_child_code lists code)
- unique_constraints_for_column("parent_id") → non-empty (composite
  UC on (parent_id, code))

Each method's any-position membership semantics is exercised — a
regression that switched to leading-position-only matching would
fail on the composite-UC and composite-FK assertions.

Closes frankenpandas-fd90.50.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
